title: Trace-Log Correlation for Token MEV Detection
why_now: The feasibility layer identified token-denominated MEV as the single biggest bottleneck limiting four of six opportunity classes. Joining canonical_execution_traces with canonical_execution_logs (ERC-20 Transfer events) would upgrade both MARGINAL classes and potentially reveal new opportunity classes not visible in ETH-only traces.

title: Multi-Day Builder Market Share Stability
why_now: The feasibility layer assessed builder market position as FEASIBLE but flagged temporal stability as unknown. All current estimates derive from single-day windows. Multi-day analysis of builder market share would validate or refute the recurrence assumption for the highest-priority research track.

title: Per-Builder Exact Market Share Execution
why_now: The feasibility layer confirmed builder market position as the primary research track. The current bounded estimates (top-3: 55-75%, HHI: 0.15-0.25) need exact per-builder GROUP BY queries to produce precise concentration metrics for the FEASIBLE class.
